APPEARANCES: Jill B. Rowe, Esq. of Cooper, White & Cooper LLP 433-1900 for pltf & opposing party; Stanley W. Smith, Esq. of Niven & Smith Law Offices 981-5451 for deft & moving party Zephyr Real Estate; Hsiao C. (Mark) Mao, Esq. of Dillingham & Murphy LLP 277-2789 for deft Suzan Reily.
